title: Hornet Removal in Pelham Manor, NY | $350 – $550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Pelham Manor, Westchester. Safe, effective nest elimination for $350 – $550. Licensed experts serving Pelham Manor homes and estates. Call today!
intro: Pelham Manor's beautiful tree-lined streets and historic properties provide ideal nesting sites for hornets, creating serious risks for residents and families. Best Pest Control NYC offers professional hornet removal services throughout Pelham Manor, safely eliminating nests from estates, Tudor homes, and landscaped properties. Our experienced technicians protect your family and property with fast, effective hornet control.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Westchester communities like Pelham Manor for years with specialized hornet removal expertise. Our licensed technicians use safe, proven methods to eliminate hornet nests while protecting your family, pets, and the beautiful mature trees and gardens that define Pelham Manor properties.
localContext: Pelham Manor's prestigious homes along Shore Road, the wooded areas near Pelham Country Club, and properties surrounding Manor Park frequently experience hornet activity during warmer months. The village's abundant greenery and mature landscaping, while beautiful, create perfect conditions for hornet colonies to establish nests in eaves, trees, and garden structures.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Pelham Manor?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Pelham Manor locations. Hornet removal typically takes 1-2 hours depending on nest size and location. We understand the urgency of hornet infestations and prioritize rapid response to protect your family and guests.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350 – $550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our service includes thorough property inspection, complete nest removal, hornet elimination, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and cleanup. Pricing depends on nest size, location accessibility, and height. We provide upfront estimates with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Are hornet removal treatments safe for my Pelham Manor property and landscaping?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted treatments that are safe for your family, pets, and the mature trees and ornamental gardens common in Pelham Manor. Our technicians take special care to protect your valuable landscaping while effectively eliminating hornets and their nests.

faqs.question: How can I prevent hornets from returning to my Pelham Manor home?
faqs.answer: After removal, we seal entry points and apply preventive treatments to vulnerable areas. We recommend regular inspections during spring and early summer, keeping gardens well-maintained, and promptly addressing any new wasp or hornet activity. We also offer seasonal prevention programs for ongoing protection.
